description: Ruby script importing actionpack 7.0.0 but only using ActionDispatch::Request, never calling the vulnerable Response#body method. CVE-2022-23633 should be not_affected.

provenance.ground_truth_notes: Only ActionDispatch::Request is used. Response#body is never called anywhere in source.

findings.human_justification: The vulnerable body method on Response is never called. Only ActionDispatch::Request is used, which does not trigger the response body leak vulnerability.
